sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67900" key="minu/rigma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῐνύρ-ιγμα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, some kind of eatable, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</entryFree>
